title: REQUIRED FEATURE: Option to Treat Formula Column As Number

posts.author: ryanDAR (RyDAR)
posts.cookedHtml:
This would solve many problems at once.

Here’s one use case among many:

I want to use the automation (when number changes, notify someone) but that only works with a manually entered number. What good is that? If I manually change the number I don’t need to be updated!

If others have use cases, please add them to this discussion.

Thanks!
Ry

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a long standing request and I would suggest not holding your breath for it to be fulfilled because the way formula columns work, is the values are calculated in your browser window - no value is stored on the server which means they are unavailable for automations.
